title: Crystal Recolorer
description: This mod allows you to change the crystals color to your desire
body:
**Crystal Recolor**
Customize the colors of End Crystals to your liking!

Crystal Recolor is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that lets you change the appearance of End Crystals with fully customizable colors. Pick separate colors for the center cube (core) and the outer rotating frames, and watch your crystals transform — both in the world and in your inventory.

**Featur**es
Separate Core & Frame Colors — Choose independent colors for the inner cube and the outer glass frames
Item Tinting — The End Crystal item in your inventory and hotbar reflects your chosen colors
Easy Configuration — Color picker GUI via Mod Menu + Cloth Config
Client-Side Only — No server installation needed, works on any server
Config Persistence — Your colors are saved and restored between sessions
**Requirements**
Minecraft 1.21.10+

```
Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
```


```
Fabric API
```


```
Cloth Config
```


```
Mod Menu (optional, for config screen access)
```

**Configuration**
Install Mod Menu
Open the Mods screen and find Crystal Recolor
Click the config button
Use the color pickers to set your Core Color and Frame Color
Save — changes apply immediately!
Config is stored in .minecraft/config/crystalrecolor.json and can also be edited manually.
